sourceText: She persevered by continuing her writing and scholarly research, refusing to suppress her intellectual curiosity. She defended her convictions without yielding, even using these challenges as material for her works, deepening their literary richness.
translatedText: Ta daure ta ci gaba da rubuce-rubucenta da bincike na masana, ta ki danne sha'awarta ta hankali. Ta kāre hukuncinta ba tare da yin nasiha ba, har ma ta yi amfani da waɗannan ƙalubalen a matsayin kayan aikinta, ta ƙara zurfafa arziƙinsu na adabi.

sourceText: 17th Century
translatedText: Karni na 17

sourceText: Li Qingzhao
translatedText: Li Qingzhao

sourceText: She endured profound hardships, including the death of her husband, forced displacement due to the Jurchen invasion, and the loss of her cherished collection of books and art.
translatedText: Ta jimre da wahalhalu masu yawa, ciki har da mutuwar mijinta, tilastawa gudun hijira saboda mamayewar Jurchen, da asarar tarin littattafai da fasaha da ta ke so.

sourceText: Despite these tribulations, she continued to write poetry, meticulously collecting scattered texts and creating new works, transforming her sorrow into art.
translatedText: Duk da wa annan wahalhalu, ta ci gaba da rubuta wakoki, tana tattara tarwatsa rubuce-rubuce da kuma kirkiro sabbin ayyuka, ta mai da bakin cikinta zuwa fasaha.

sourceText: Song Dynasty
translatedText: Daular Song

sourceText: Matsuo Basho
translatedText: Matsuo Basho

sourceText: The early death of his father and the subsequent fall of his family led to an unstable life. Even after achieving fame, he relentlessly pursued poetic perfection, grappling with deep inner turmoil.
translatedText: Mutuwar mahaifinsa da farko da kuma faduwar danginsa ta kai ga rashin kwanciyar hankali. Ko da ya sami shahara, ya ci gaba da bin kamalar waƙa, yana kokawa da hargitsi mai zurfi.

sourceText: Through profound communion with nature, he grasped the essence of life. His extensive travels broadened his understanding of the world, elevating his poetic realm. His struggles were transmuted into profound verse.
translatedText: Ta hanyar zumunci mai zurfi da yanayi, ya fahimci ainihin rayuwa. Yawan tafiye-tafiyen da ya yi ya fadada fahimtarsa ​​game da duniya, ya daukaka daularsa ta waka. Gwagwarmayarsa ta koma cikin aya mai zurfi.

sourceText: Edo Period (1603-1868)
translatedText: Zaman Edo (1603-1868)

sourceText: William Wilberforce
translatedText: William Wilberforce

sourceText: His lifelong campaign against the slave trade was fraught with immense opposition, political pressure, and personal attacks. Health issues and bouts of despair also plagued him.
translatedText: Yaƙin da ya yi na tsawon rayuwarsa a kan cinikin bayi yana cike da babbar hamayya, matsi na siyasa, da kai hari. Batun lafiya da fidda rai suma sun addabe shi.

sourceText: Fueled by deep conviction, the support of allies, and his Christian faith, he persevered through setbacks, relentlessly advocating for legislation in Parliament.
translatedText: Saboda cikakken tabbaci, goyon bayan abokansa, da kuma bangaskiyarsa na Kirista, ya jajirce ta hanyar koma baya, ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba yana ba da shawarar kafa doka a Majalisa.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 18th - Farkon Ƙarni na 19

sourceText: Toussaint Louverture
translatedText: Toussaint Louverture

sourceText: He endured the brutal system of slavery and racial discrimination under French colonial rule. Furthermore, he suffered through numerous wars, internal conflicts, and betrayals during the struggle for independence.
translatedText: Ya jure mummunan tsarin bauta da wariyar launin fata a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Faransa. Bugu da ƙari, ya sha fama da yaƙe-yaƙe masu yawa, rikice-rikice na cikin gida, da cin amana a lokacin gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai.

sourceText: He successfully led the slave rebellion, declared Haiti's independence, abolished slavery, and worked towards rebuilding the nation. His leadership and dedication brought freedom and hope to the people of Haiti.
translatedText: Ya yi nasarar jagorantar tawayen bayi, ya ayyana ’yancin kai na Haiti, ya kawar da bautar, kuma ya yi aiki don sake gina al’umma. Jagorancinsa da sadaukarwarsa ya kawo 'yanci da bege ga mutanen Haiti.

sourceText: Late 18th - Early 19th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 18th - Farkon Ƙarni na 19

sourceText: Sojourner Truth
translatedText: Gaskiya Baƙo

sourceText: Born into slavery, she endured brutal abuse, family separations, and the denial of her basic human rights. She was illiterate and faced profound racism and sexism even after gaining her freedom.
translatedText: An haife ta cikin bauta, ta jimre da mugun zalunci, rabuwar iyali, da kuma tauye mata haƙƙoƙin ɗan adam. Ba ta da ilimi kuma ta fuskanci tsananin wariyar launin fata da jima'i ko da bayan samun 'yancinta.

sourceText: Guided by her deep faith and an unyielding spirit, she became a powerful voice for abolition and women's rights. She used her personal experiences and eloquent oratory to awaken consciences and demand justice.
translatedText: Jagoranta ta zurfafan bangaskiyarta da ruhin da ba ta da ƙarfi, ta zama murya mai ƙarfi don kawar da yancin mata. Ta yi amfani da irin abubuwan da ta samu da kuma iya magana don tada lamiri da neman adalci.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Emmeline Pankhurst
translatedText: Emmeline Pankhurst asalin

sourceText: The oppressive nature of a male-dominated society, political disenfranchisement, repeated arrests and imprisonment, the physical toll of hunger strikes, and the suffering of her family.
translatedText: Halin zaluncin al'ummar da maza ke mamaye da su, rashin samun 'yancin siyasa, kamawa da dauri akai-akai, yawan kashe yunwa da wahalar da danginta.

sourceText: Through strong leadership, strategic protests, solidarity with fellow suffragettes, and an unyielding determination, she helped change societal perceptions and ultimately achieve voting rights for women.
translatedText: Ta hanyar jagoranci mai ƙarfi, zanga-zangar dabarun, haɗin kai tare da ƴan takara, da jajircewa mara jajircewa, ta taimaka wajen canza ra'ayin al'umma kuma a ƙarshe ta sami 'yancin zaɓe ga mata.

sourceText: Late 19th - Early 20th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 19th - Farkon ƙarni na 20

sourceText: The relentless oppression and injustice under Spanish colonial rule, the suffering of his fellow Filipinos, and his own imprisonment, exile, and eventual execution due to his advocacy for reform and his writings.
translatedText: Zalunci da rashin adalci a karkashin mulkin mallaka na Spain, da wahalar da ’yan uwansa Filipins, da kuma daure shi, da gudun hijira, da kuma kisa daga karshe saboda shawararsa na kawo gyara da rubuce-rubucensa.

sourceText: He championed reform through education and literature, believing in the power of reason and enlightenment to effect change. His martyrdom galvanized the Philippine independence movement, inspiring future generations.
translatedText: Ya jajirce wajen kawo sauyi ta hanyar ilimi da adabi, yana mai imani da karfin hankali da wayewar kai wajen kawo sauyi. Shahadarsa ta zaburar da yunƙurin samun yancin kai na Philippine, wanda ya zaburar da al'ummomin da za su zo nan gaba.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Mary Wollstonecraft
translatedText: Mary Wollstonecraft

sourceText: Women faced severe limitations in educational opportunities and were socially subordinate. She also endured financial hardships and personal relationship struggles.
translatedText: Mata sun fuskanci gazawa mai tsanani a cikin damar ilimi kuma sun kasance ƙarƙashin zamantakewa. Ta kuma jimre wa matsalolin kuɗi da gwagwarmayar dangantaka ta sirri.

sourceText: She channeled her experiences and beliefs into writing, advocating for women's rational capabilities and challenging societal prejudices. She championed educational reform and women's independence to overcome these obstacles.
translatedText: Ta gabatar da abubuwan da ta samu da imaninta zuwa rubuce-rubuce, tana ba da shawarwari ga iyawar mata da ƙalubalantar son zuciya a cikin al'umma. Ta yi gwagwarmayar sake fasalin ilimi da 'yancin mata don shawo kan wadannan matsalolin.

sourceText: 18th Century
translatedText: Karni na 18

sourceText: Lucretia Mott
translatedText: Lucretia Mott

sourceText: As a woman and an abolitionist, Mott faced significant societal prejudice and ostracism. She was denied the right to speak at anti-slavery conventions and faced public scorn for her radical views.
translatedText: A matsayinsa na mace kuma mai kawar da kai, Mott ya fuskanci babban son zuciya da kyama a cikin al'umma. An hana ta 'yancin yin magana a taron adawa da bauta kuma ta fuskanci ba'a ga jama'a saboda ra'ayoyinta masu tsattsauran ra'ayi.

sourceText: Mott channeled her frustrations into action, becoming a powerful orator and organizer. She co-founded numerous organizations, including the Philadelphia Female Anti-Slavery Society, and steadfastly advocated for both women's rights and the end of slavery, inspiring many.
translatedText: Mott ta ba da bacin ranta cikin aiki, ta zama mai magana mai ƙarfi kuma mai tsarawa. Ta haɗu da ƙungiyoyi da yawa, ciki har da Philadelphia Female Anti-Slavery Society, kuma ta yi tsayin daka wajen ba da haƙƙin haƙƙin mata biyu da kuma ƙarshen bauta, wanda ya zaburar da mutane da yawa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: Arduous journeys, unfamiliar cultures and languages, illness, and imprisonment.
translatedText: Tafiya masu wahala, al'adu da harsuna waɗanda ba a san su ba, rashin lafiya, da ɗauri.

sourceText: Through keen observation, adaptability, and persistent documentation, he came to understand and inform Europe about the unfamiliar world.
translatedText: Ta hanyar lura sosai, daidaitawa, da kuma rubuce-rubuce masu tsayi, ya zo ya fahimta kuma ya sanar da Turai game da duniyar da ba a sani ba.

sourceText: 13th Century
translatedText: Karni na 13

sourceText: Suffered from severe illness on his first voyage, faced threats of mutiny from his crew, and endured harsh maritime conditions and hostile encounters.
translatedText: Ya sha fama da matsananciyar rashin lafiya a tafiyarsa ta farko, ya fuskanci barazanar halaka daga ma'aikatan jirginsa, kuma ya jure mawuyacin yanayi na teku da gamuwa da ƙiyayya.

sourceText: Overcame adversities with an indomitable will, exceptional seamanship, and the crucial support of the Portuguese crown, achieving his objectives.
translatedText: Nasarar masifu tare da iznin da ba za a iya jurewa ba, jirgin ruwa na musamman, da kuma muhimmin goyon baya na kambin Portuguese, tare da cimma manufofinsa.

sourceText: Late 15th - Early 16th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 15th - Farkon Ƙarni na 16

sourceText: Ferdinand Magellan
translatedText: Ferdinand Magellan

sourceText: Magellan faced significant adversity, including being denied patronage by the Portuguese crown, forcing him to seek sponsorship from Spain. His voyage was fraught with mutinies, disease, starvation, and hostile encounters with indigenous peoples.
translatedText: Magellan ya fuskanci bala'i mai mahimmanci, ciki har da kambin Portuguese ya hana shi neman tallafi, wanda ya tilasta masa neman tallafi daga Spain. Tafiyar nasa tana cike da ƴan ta'adda, cututtuka, yunwa, da gamuwa da ƙiyayya da ƴan asalin ƙasar.

sourceText: Despite these immense challenges, Magellan's unwavering determination, exceptional seamanship, and strong leadership guided his fleet. He persevered through despair and danger, ultimately achieving the monumental feat of the first circumnavigation.
translatedText: Duk da waɗannan ƙalubalen ƙalubalen, ƙudirin Magellan, ƙwaƙƙwaran jirgin ruwa, da jagoranci mai ƙarfi ya jagoranci rundunarsa. Ya daure ta hanyar yanke kauna da hadari, daga karshe ya kai ga gagarumin gagarumin aikin dawafi na farko.

sourceText: 16th Century
translatedText: Karni na 16

sourceText: Cornelius Vanderbilt
translatedText: Cornelius Vanderbilt ne adam wata

sourceText: He faced early struggles due to poverty and a lack of formal education, and later, intense competition and market volatility in his shipping ventures.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci gwagwarmaya tun farko saboda talauci da rashin ilimin boko, daga baya kuma, gasa mai tsanani da tabarbarewar kasuwa a harkar safarar sa.

sourceText: Vanderbilt overcame these challenges through sheer hard work, strategic innovation, and a ruthless drive to dominate his markets, eventually transitioning from shipping to railroads.
translatedText: Vanderbilt ya shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubalen ta hanyar aiki tuƙuru, kirkire-kirkire dabaru, da yunƙurin rashin tausayi don mamaye kasuwannin sa, daga ƙarshe ya rikiɗe daga jigilar kaya zuwa hanyoyin jirgin ƙasa.

sourceText: 19th Century
translatedText: Karni na 19

sourceText: During his two missions to the Western Regions, he was captured by the Xiongnu and held captive for over ten years. He faced numerous dangers and hardships during his return journey.
translatedText: A yayin ziyararsa guda biyu zuwa yankunan Yamma, 'yan kabilar Xiongnu sun kama shi kuma sun yi garkuwa da shi sama da shekaru goma. Ya gamu da hatsari da wahalhalu da dama a tafiyarsa ta dawowa.

sourceText: Despite the harsh trials, he persevered, survived, and waited for opportunities. He eventually escaped, completed his mission, and returned, greatly contributing to the Han Dynasty's territorial expansion.
translatedText: Duk da matsananciyar gwaji, ya daure, ya tsira, kuma ya jira dama. Daga karshe ya tsere, ya kammala aikinsa, ya dawo, ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga fadada yankin daular Han.

sourceText: Western Han Dynasty
translatedText: Daular Han ta Yamma

sourceText: The painful experience of becoming a eunuch and entering the palace in his youth, the dangers of treacherous seas, and the difficulties amidst political intrigue.
translatedText: Abin sha'awa mai raɗaɗi na zama bābā da shiga gidan sarauta a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, haɗarin tekuna mayaudari, da wahalhalu a cikin makircin siyasa.

sourceText: He gained the emperor's trust through his outstanding abilities and loyalty, successfully leading massive fleets to achieve monumental accomplishments, thereby overcoming hardships.
translatedText: Ya sami amincewar sarki ta wurin iyawarsa da amincinsa, inda ya yi nasarar jagorantar manyan jiragen ruwa don cimma manyan nasarori, ta haka ya shawo kan wahala.

sourceText: Early Ming Dynasty (15th Century)
translatedText: Farkon Daular Ming (ƙarni na 15)

sourceText: Leif Erikson
translatedText: Leif Erikson

sourceText: His father Erik the Red's exile and the harsh conditions of the Greenland settlement, coupled with the isolation of unfamiliar lands, presented significant challenges.
translatedText: Mahaifinsa Erik the Red's gudun hijira da kuma mummunan yanayi na mazauna Greenland, tare da keɓance ƙasashen da ba a sani ba, sun gabatar da ƙalubale masu mahimmanci.

sourceText: Leif overcame these trials through his persistent spirit of exploration and leadership. He strengthened the Greenland settlement and expanded Viking reach by venturing to North America, forging his own destiny.
translatedText: Leif ya ci nasara da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje ta wurin dagewar ruhunsa na bincike da jagoranci. Ya ƙarfafa matsugunan Greenland kuma ya faɗaɗa isa ga Viking ta hanyar shiga Arewacin Amurka, ya ƙirƙira nasa makoma.

sourceText: Late 10th - Early 11th Century
translatedText: Marigayi 10th - Farkon Ƙarni na 11

sourceText: Charlemagne
translatedText: Charlemagne

sourceText: 8th - 9th Century Giant
translatedText: 8th - 9th Century Giant

sourceText: 15th Century Giant
translatedText: Giant na Karni na 15

sourceText: 16th Century Giant
translatedText: Giant na Karni na 16

sourceText: 17th Century Giant
translatedText: Giant na Karni na 17

sourceText: Ancient Hellenistic Giant
translatedText: Tsohon Hellenistic Giant

sourceText: Michael Faraday
translatedText: Michael Faraday

sourceText: Poverty in his youth and a lack of formal education were significant obstacles to satisfying his intellectual curiosity. He also sometimes experienced internal conflict between his deep religious faith and his scientific inquiries.
translatedText: Talauci a lokacin kuruciyarsa da rashin ilimin boko sun kasance manya-manyan cikas ga gamsar da sha'awar sa. Har ila yau, wani lokaci yakan fuskanci sabani na cikin gida tsakanin zurfin imaninsa na addini da bincikensa na kimiyya.

sourceText: He acquired scientific knowledge through self-study and advanced his theories by presenting lectures at the Royal Institution, widely disseminating his findings. He overcame internal conflicts by striving to harmonize his faith and science.
translatedText: Ya sami ilimin kimiyya ta hanyar nazarin kansa kuma ya ci gaba da ka'idojinsa ta hanyar gabatar da laccoci a Royal Institution, yana yada sakamakonsa. Ya shawo kan rikice-rikice na cikin gida ta hanyar ƙoƙarin daidaita bangaskiyarsa da iliminsa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Illegitimacy in his youth led to constant internal struggles and rebellions within Normandy. Later, securing and maintaining control over England involved suppressing numerous uprisings and consolidating power.
translatedText: Rashin doka a cikin ƙuruciyarsa ya haifar da gwagwarmaya na ciki da kuma tawaye a cikin Normandy. Daga baya, tabbatarwa da kiyaye ikon Ingila ya ƙunshi murkushe tashe-tashen hankula masu yawa da ƙarfafa iko.

sourceText: Through military prowess, strategic brilliance, and a ruthless determination, he quelled rebellions, established a new aristocracy loyal to him, and implemented administrative reforms that laid the foundation for a strong, centralized English monarchy.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bajintar soji, basirar dabara, da azama mara tausayi, ya kori tawaye, ya kafa sabon sarki mai biyayya gareshi, ya aiwatar da gyare-gyaren gudanarwa wanda ya kafa harsashin mulkin mallaka na Ingilishi mai ƙarfi.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: He faced the oppression of the Medes, attempts to usurp the throne, and the challenges of building a unified empire amidst the conflicts of various peoples.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci zaluncin Mediya, yunƙurin kwace mulki, da ƙalubalen gina daula mai haɗin kai a tsakanin rikice-rikice na al'ummomi daban-daban.

sourceText: Through his outstanding military strategy, diplomacy, and policy of tolerance towards conquered peoples, he overcame these difficulties and established a vast empire.
translatedText: Ta hanyar fitattun dabarunsa na soja, diflomasiyya, da manufofinsa na juriya ga al'ummomin da aka ci yaki da su, ya shawo kan wadannan matsaloli, ya kafa daula mai fadi.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: He faced persecution under the Nazi regime, forcing him into exile. He also grappled with the profound philosophical and metaphysical implications of his theories, which led to intense debate.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci tsanantawa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Nazi, wanda ya tilasta masa yin hijira. Har ila yau, ya yi gwagwarmaya da zurfin ilimin falsafa da abubuwan da suka shafi tunaninsa, wanda ya haifar da muhawara mai tsanani.

sourceText: Despite these adversities, Schrödinger's passion for science remained undimmed. He continued his research in various countries, refining his theories. He engaged in deep introspection on complex scientific and philosophical issues, pursuing intellectual inquiry relentlessly.
translatedText: Duk da waɗannan matsalolin, sha'awar kimiyyar Schrödinger ta kasance ba ta dusashe ba. Ya ci gaba da bincike a kasashe daban-daban, yana mai tace ka'idojinsa. Ya shagaltu da zurfafa zurfafa bincike kan al'amuran kimiyya da falsafa masu sarkakiya, yana bin bincike na hankali ba tare da gajiyawa ba.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Giuseppe Garibaldi
translatedText: Giuseppe Garibaldi

sourceText: Garibaldi endured political exile, numerous battlefield defeats and victories, the loss of loved ones, and the painful reality of a still-divided Italy even after unification. The gap between his ideals and reality caused him great suffering.
translatedText: Garibaldi ya jure gudun hijira na siyasa, yawan shan kashi da nasara a fagen fama, asarar ƙaunatattunsa, da kuma raɗaɗin gaskiyar Italiya mai rarrabu ko da bayan haɗewa. Tazarar da ke tsakanin manufofinsa da gaskiyarsa ta jawo masa wahala mai yawa.

sourceText: Despite setbacks, he never abandoned his convictions. He rose again after defeats, overcoming difficulties through solidarity with his comrades. His indomitable will and leadership ultimately became the driving force behind the great cause of Italian unification.
translatedText: Duk da koma baya, bai yi watsi da hukuncin da ya yanke ba. Ya sake tashi bayan ya sha kaye, inda ya shawo kan matsaloli ta hanyar hadin kai da abokansa. Ƙaunar da ba ta iya jurewa da shugabancinsa daga ƙarshe ya zama ƙwaƙƙwaran da ke haifar da babban dalilin haɗewar Italiya.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: James Clerk Maxwell
translatedText: James Clerk Maxwell

sourceText: Maxwell experienced personal loss early in life with the death of his mother. He also faced health challenges during his studies and encountered initial resistance from the scientific community regarding his groundbreaking theories.
translatedText: Maxwell ya sami asarar kansa a farkon rayuwarsa tare da mutuwar mahaifiyarsa. Ya kuma fuskanci kalubalen kiwon lafiya a lokacin karatunsa kuma ya fuskanci turjiya ta farko daga al'ummar kimiyya game da ka'idojinsa masu tasowa.

sourceText: He drew strength from his deep religious faith and his unwavering dedication to scientific inquiry. Despite setbacks, Maxwell persevered in his research, refining his theories through collaboration and intellectual discourse, ultimately achieving recognition for his profound insights.
translatedText: Ya sami ƙarfi daga zurfin imaninsa na addini da sadaukarwarsa ga binciken kimiyya. Duk da koma baya, Maxwell ya jajirce a cikin bincikensa, yana mai tace ra'ayoyinsa ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da tattaunawa ta hankali, daga ƙarshe ya sami karɓuwa ga zurfin fahimtarsa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Moctezuma II
translatedText: Moctezuma II

sourceText: The invasion by Spanish conquistadors and the subsequent collapse of his empire were the greatest trials of his reign. He struggled to protect his people and civilization.
translatedText: Yunkurin mamayar Mutanen Espanya da rugujewar daularsa ta biyo baya sune manyan jarabawowin mulkinsa. Ya yi gwagwarmaya don kare al'ummarsa da wayewa.

sourceText: Moctezuma II attempted to preserve the empire through diplomatic and political negotiations with the Spanish. Although his efforts were ultimately unsuccessful, he strived to maintain dignity until the end.
translatedText: Moctezuma II yayi ƙoƙarin kiyaye daular ta hanyar tattaunawar diflomasiya da siyasa tare da Mutanen Espanya. Ko da yake ƙoƙarinsa bai yi nasara a ƙarshe ba, ya yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye mutunci har zuwa ƙarshe.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Tran Hung Dao
translatedText: Tran Hung Dao

sourceText: The devastation of the land and suffering of the people due to three successive Mongol invasions, and the challenge of maintaining unwavering leadership amidst internal divisions and conflicts.
translatedText: Barnar kasa da wahalhalun da jama'a suka fuskanta sakamakon mamayar Mongol guda uku a jere, da kuma kalubalen tabbatar da shugabanci mara tushe a cikin rarrabuwar kawuna da rikice-rikice na cikin gida.

sourceText: He repelled the Mongol forces and defended the nation with outstanding strategy, military tactics, and a unifying leadership that rallied the populace. Furthermore, he overcame internal strife and achieved national unity through his exceptional political acumen.
translatedText: Ya fatattaki sojojin Mongol ya kuma kare al'ummar kasar da dabara, dabarun soji, da jagoranci na hadin kai wanda ya hada jama'a. Haka kuma, ya shawo kan rigingimun cikin gida, ya kuma samu hadin kan kasa ta hanyar kwarewarsa ta siyasa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: After the sudden death of my husband, I was forced to defend the empire alone amidst the ambitions of the Roman Empire and threats of internal rebellion. Fighting against Rome, with its immense military might, was a constant struggle for survival.
translatedText: Bayan mutuwar mijina ba zato ba tsammani, an tilasta ni na kāre daular ni kaɗai a cikin burin daular Roma da kuma barazanar tawaye na cikin gida. Yaƙi da Roma, tare da ƙaƙƙarfan ƙarfinsa na soja, gwagwarmaya ce ta ci gaba da rayuwa.

sourceText: With unwavering resolve and exceptional military command, I suppressed rebellions and fought against Rome. I unified many regions of the East, expanding the Palmyrene Empire and building a powerful force capable of challenging Rome.
translatedText: Da ƙudiri mai ƙarfi da kwamandan soja na musamman, na kawar da tawaye kuma na yi yaƙi da Roma. Na haɗa yankuna da yawa na Gabas, na faɗaɗa daular Palmyrene da gina ƙarfi mai ƙarfi da zai iya ƙalubalantar Roma.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Georges Cuvier
translatedText: Georges Kuvier

sourceText: Cuvier had to contend with the widely accepted theory of 'species fixity,' which posited that all species were immutable and had existed eternally. He also faced the immense task of collecting and meticulously organizing vast quantities of anatomical specimens for his research.
translatedText: Cuvier had to contend with the widely accepted theory of 'species fixity,' which posited that all species were immutable and had existed eternally. Ya kuma fuskanci babban aiki na tattarawa da kuma tsara tsattsauran ra'ayi mai yawa na samfuran halittar jiki don bincikensa.

sourceText: Through rigorous study of the fossil record and detailed comparative anatomical analysis, Cuvier presented evidence for extinction, demonstrating that numerous creatures from the past had indeed vanished. By closely examining the internal structures of animals and revealing how each skeletal part related to the organism's overall mode of life, he established the principle of the 'correlation of forms.' This became the foundation for his groundbreaking classification system and theory of extinction.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bincike mai zurfi game da tarihin burbushin halittu da cikakken kwatankwacin nazarin jikin mutum, Cuvier ya gabatar da shaidar bacewa, yana nuna cewa haƙiƙa halittu masu yawa daga baya sun ɓace. Ta hanyar yin nazari sosai a cikin sifofin dabbobi da kuma bayyana yadda kowane ɓangaren kwarangwal ke da alaƙa da tsarin rayuwar gabaɗayan kwayoyin halitta, ya kafa ka'idar 'daidaitawar siffofi'. Wannan ya zama ginshiƙi na tsarinsa na rarrabuwar kawuna da ka'idar karewa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Establishing pharaonic authority as a woman was a significant challenge. In a male-dominated society, I had to legitimize my rule, quell opposition, and ensure my reign was recognized.
translatedText: Samar da ikon fir'auna a matsayin mace babban kalubale ne. A cikin al’ummar da maza ke da rinjaye, dole ne in halasta mulkina, in kashe ‘yan adawa, kuma in tabbatar da mulkina.

sourceText: I presented myself in the iconography of a male pharaoh and produced evidence of my father's designation as his successor to strengthen my claim. Furthermore, I secured the people's support through successful trade expeditions and monumental construction projects, proving my reign was both legitimate and beneficial to Egypt.
translatedText: Na gabatar da kaina a cikin hoton fir'auna namiji kuma na samar da shaidar naɗa mahaifina a matsayin magajinsa don ƙarfafa da'awara. Bugu da ƙari, na sami goyon bayan jama'a ta hanyar balaguron kasuwanci na nasara da ayyukan gine-gine, na tabbatar da mulkina na halal ne kuma mai amfani ga Masar.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Heraclitus experienced profound distress due to the political turmoil of his native Ephesus and the ignorance of its citizens. He felt alienated by a world that misunderstood and scorned his philosophy, forcing him to pursue truth in solitude.
translatedText: Heraclitus ya fuskanci tsananin baƙin ciki saboda hargitsin siyasa na ƙasarsa Afisa da jahilci na 'yan ƙasa. Ya ji duniyar da ba ta fahimta ba kuma ta raina falsafarsa, ta tilasta masa ya bi gaskiya cikin kadaici.

sourceText: Through his detachment from society, he delved deeper into his inner wisdom. His solitude transformed into profound insight into the essence of truth, leading him to discover the 'Logos', the underlying universal order.
translatedText: Ta hanyar ware kansa daga al'umma, ya zurfafa zurfin hikimarsa na ciki. Keɓantawarsa ya rikiɗe zuwa zurfin fahimta cikin ainihin gaskiya, wanda ya kai shi ga gano 'Logos', tushen tsarin duniya.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: He faced political persecution and internal divisions within his community, forcing him to flee his homeland. He experienced the pain of his ideas being misunderstood and his community disintegrating.
translatedText: Ya fuskanci tsangwama na siyasa da rarrabuwar kawuna a cikin al’ummarsa, lamarin da ya tilasta masa barin kasarsa. Ya dandana azabar rashin fahimtar ra'ayinsa da wargaza al'ummarsa.

sourceText: Despite persecution and communal crises, his mathematical and philosophical achievements were passed down to posterity, and his thought became a cornerstone of Western philosophy and science.
translatedText: Duk da tsanantawa da rikice-rikicen jama'a, nasarorinsa na ilmin lissafi da na falsafa sun koma ga zuriya, tunaninsa ya zama ginshiƙin falsafa da kimiyyar Yammacin Turai.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Ramesses II
translatedText: Ramses II

sourceText: I ascended to the throne at a young age due to the unexpected death of my father, Seti I. The constant wars with the Hittite Empire drained our resources. Furthermore, I faced challenges regarding succession and the threat of internal rebellions.
translatedText: Na hau kan karagar mulki tun ina karama saboda mutuwar ubana, Seti I. Ba zato ba tsammani. Yaƙe-yaƙe da Daular Hittiyawa ya jawo mana albarka. Bugu da ƙari, na fuskanci ƙalubale game da magaji da kuma barazanar tawaye na cikin gida.

sourceText: Through my exceptional military prowess and diplomatic skill, I ended the wars with the Hittites and established a peace treaty. I also commissioned colossal structures like the Abu Simbel temples, enhancing Egypt's prestige and solidifying the loyalty of my people. I ensured dynastic stability by fathering numerous children.
translatedText: Ta wurin bajinta na na soja da fasaha na diflomasiyya, na kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe da Hittiyawa kuma na kafa yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya. Na kuma ba da manyan gine-gine kamar haikalin Abu Simbel, na ƙara ɗaukaka Masarawa da ƙarfafa amincin mutanena. Na tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali ta hanyar haihuwa da yawa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Mocked and ridiculed by his contemporaries for living like a dog and defying social norms.
translatedText: Mutanen zamaninsa sun yi masa ba'a da izgili da cewa suna rayuwa kamar kare da rashin bin ka'idojin zamantakewa.

sourceText: Embraced the insult, proud to be called a Cynic (dog-like), and ultimately won the respect of thinkers and kings, including Alexander the Great.
translatedText: Ya rungumi zagi, yana alfahari da a kira shi Cynic (kamar kare), kuma a ƙarshe ya sami girmamawar masu tunani da sarakuna, ciki har da Alexander the Great.

sourceText: 4th Century BC Giant
translatedText: Karni na 4 BC Giant

sourceText: James Hutton
translatedText: James Hutton

sourceText: Hutton's revolutionary ideas, particularly his concept of an ancient Earth with immense geological time, often met with skepticism and opposition from prevailing religious and scientific views of his era. His seminal work, 'Theory of the Earth,' was complex and challenging for many to accept initially.
translatedText: Ra'ayoyin juyin juya hali na Hutton, musamman ma tunaninsa na tsohuwar duniya tare da ƙayyadaddun lokaci, sau da yawa yakan fuskanci shakku da adawa daga rinjayen ra'ayoyin addini da na kimiyya game da zamaninsa. Ayyukansa na seminal, 'Theory of the Earth,' ya kasance mai rikitarwa kuma yana da kalubale ga mutane da yawa su yarda da farko.

sourceText: Undeterred, Hutton meticulously gathered evidence through extensive fieldwork across Scotland. He observed rock formations, unconformities, and erosion patterns, systematically building a case for his theories. His persistence and the weight of his empirical observations eventually led to the gradual acceptance of his profound insights into Earth's history.
translatedText: Ba tare da damuwa ba, Hutton ya tattara shaidu da kyau ta hanyar fage mai yawa a cikin Scotland. Ya lura da gyare-gyaren dutse, rashin daidaituwa, da sifofin yazawa, yana gina shari'ar bisa tsarin tunaninsa. Dagewarsa da nauyin abubuwan da ya lura da shi a ƙarshe ya haifar da karɓuwa sannu a hankali na zurfin fahimtarsa ​​game da tarihin duniya.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Ernest Shackleton
translatedText: Ernest Shackleton ne adam wata

sourceText: During the Imperial Trans-Antarctic Expedition in 1914, the Endurance was trapped and crushed by Antarctic ice. Shackleton had to lead his men through extreme cold, starvation, and despair, covering 1,200 miles in open boats. He also faced significant financial difficulties from business ventures.
translatedText: A lokacin balaguron balaguro na Imperial Trans-Antarctic a cikin 1914, ƙanƙarar Antarctic ta makale kuma ta murƙushe ta. Shackleton ya ja-goranci mutanensa cikin matsanancin sanyi, yunwa, da rashin bege, wanda ya yi tafiyar mil 1,200 a cikin kwale-kwale. Ya kuma fuskanci matsalolin kudi daga harkokin kasuwanci.

sourceText: Despite the direst circumstances, Shackleton maintained hope and, through exceptional leadership and courage, achieved the miracle of bringing all his men back alive. He undertook seemingly impossible challenges, including the boat journey, the attempted Antarctic crossing, and the perilous overland trek to seek rescue. He also worked to rebuild his fortunes after business failures.
translatedText: Duk da munanan yanayi, Shackleton ya ci gaba da bege kuma, ta hanyar jagoranci na musamman da jajircewa, ya sami abin al'ajabi na maido da dukan mutanensa da rai. Ya ɗauki ƙalubalen da ba za su taɓa yiwuwa ba, ciki har da tafiyar jirgin ruwa, yunƙurin tsallakawa Antarctic, da kuma balaguron balaguron ƙasa don neman ceto. Ya kuma yi aiki don sake gina dukiyarsa bayan gazawar kasuwanci.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Dorothea Dix
translatedText: Dorothea Dix

sourceText: Her own health struggles and the deep anguish of witnessing the inhumane treatment of the mentally ill amidst societal indifference.
translatedText: Ita kanta tana fama da tsananin bakin ciki na ganin yadda ake musgunawa masu tabin hankali a cikin halin ko-in-kula a tsakanin al'umma.

sourceText: Transmuting personal suffering into dedication for the vulnerable, she relentlessly pursued legal and institutional reforms, shifting societal perceptions of mental illness.
translatedText: Ta canza wahala ta sirri zuwa sadaukarwa ga masu rauni, ta ci gaba da bin doka da gyare-gyaren hukumomi, canza tunanin al'umma game da tabin hankali.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Franz Schubert
translatedText: Franz Schubert

sourceText: Poverty, illness, and an unfinished life
translatedText: Talauci, rashin lafiya, da rayuwar da ba a gama ba

sourceText: Unrelenting creative passion and the support of friends
translatedText: Ƙwararriyar ƙirƙira marar ƙarewa da goyon bayan abokai

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: His father's severe discipline and military training, coupled with his own homosexual inclinations, created profound familial conflict. The constant threat of war and diplomatic isolation also imposed immense psychological strain.
translatedText: Tsananin horon mahaifinsa da horon soja, haɗe da nasa sha'awar ɗan luwaɗi, ya haifar da rikicin dangi. Barazanar yaƙe-yaƙe da keɓancewa na diflomasiyya ya kuma haifar da matsananciyar damuwa.

sourceText: He found solace and intellectual stimulation in philosophy, music, and the arts, particularly his flute playing. Strategically, he overcame existential threats to Prussia through brilliant military campaigns and astute diplomacy, solidifying his legacy.
translatedText: Ya sami nutsuwa da kuzarin hankali a cikin falsafa, kiɗa, da fasaha, musamman bugun sarewa. Da dabara, ya shawo kan barazanar wanzuwa ga Prussia ta hanyar ƙwaƙƙwaran yaƙin neman zaɓe na soja da diflomasiyya mai ƙware, yana ƙarfafa gadonsa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Harriet Martineau
translatedText: Harriet Martineau

sourceText: She suffered from hearing loss from a young age and chronic health issues throughout her life. Martineau also faced significant limitations in pursuing academic endeavors as a woman and battled societal prejudices.
translatedText: Ta sha fama da rashin ji tun tana karama da kuma matsalolin lafiya a tsawon rayuwarta. Martineau ya kuma fuskanci gazawa sosai wajen neman ilimi a matsayinsa na mace da kuma fama da son zuciya a cikin al'umma.

sourceText: She transformed her personal challenges into powerful tools for writing and social commentary. Through unwavering intellectual curiosity and prolific authorship, she transcended societal barriers to become an influential figure.
translatedText: Ta canza ƙalubalen nata zuwa kayan aiki masu ƙarfi don rubutu da sharhin zamantakewa. Ta hanyar sha'awar hankali da ƙwaƙƙwaran marubuci, ta tsallake shingen al'umma ta zama jigo mai tasiri.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Ida B. Wells
translatedText: Ida B. Wells

sourceText: The lynching of her close friends in Memphis, Tennessee, profoundly impacted her. She witnessed firsthand the systemic violence and injustice faced by African Americans. As a Black woman, she navigated the dual challenges of racism and sexism, which often hindered her activism.
translatedText: Ƙullawar abokanta na kud da kud a Memphis, Tennessee, ya yi mata tasiri sosai. Ta gane wa idonta irin tashe-tashen hankula da rashin adalci da 'yan Afirkan Amurka ke fuskanta. A matsayinta na Bakar fata, ta bi ƙalubalen ƙalubalen wariyar launin fata da jima'i, waɗanda galibi ke hana mata fafutuka.

sourceText: Wells wielded her pen as a powerful weapon, meticulously documenting lynchings and publishing her findings in works like 'Southern Horrors: Lynch Law in All Its Phases.' She exposed lynching not as random acts of violence but as a deliberate tool of racial oppression. She co-founded the NAACP and other organizations, channeling her fight into organized activism for lasting change.
translatedText: Wells ta yi amfani da alƙalaminta a matsayin makami mai ƙarfi, tana mai da hankali kan tattara bayanan lynchings da buga bincikenta a cikin ayyukan kamar 'Southern Horrors: Lynch Law in All Its Phases.' Ta fallasa zalincin ba a matsayin tashin hankali ba amma a matsayin kayan aiki da gangan na zaluncin launin fata. Ta kafa NAACP tare da sauran kungiyoyi, inda ta ba da yakinta zuwa tsarin gwagwarmaya don samun canji mai dorewa.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: Despite early success, Rembrandt endured immense personal tragedy, losing his wife Saskia and three sons. Financially, he faced ruin due to extravagant spending and poor investments, leading to bankruptcy and the loss of his possessions.
translatedText: Duk da nasarar da ya yi da wuri, Rembrandt ya jimre da babban bala'i, ya rasa matarsa ​​Saskia da 'ya'ya maza uku. Ta fannin kudi kuwa, ya fuskanci rugujewa saboda kashe-kashe da rashin zuba jari, wanda ya kai ga fatara da asarar dukiyarsa.

sourceText: Even after his financial downfall, Rembrandt's dedication to his art never wavered. He continued to paint, producing some of his most profound works, characterized by a deeper understanding of humanity and a more restrained, introspective style. His later pieces possess a quiet dignity and emotional depth that transcends material loss.
translatedText: Ko da bayan faduwar kuɗinsa, sadaukarwar Rembrandt ga fasahar sa ba ta taɓa gushewa ba. Ya ci gaba da yin fenti, yana samar da wasu zurfafan ayyukansa, waɗanda ke da zurfin fahimtar ɗan adam da kuma kamewa, salon shiga ciki. Yankunansa na baya suna da mutunci mai nutsuwa da zurfin tunani wanda ya wuce asarar abin duniya.

sourceText: Giants of History
translatedText: Kattai na Tarihi

sourceText: His childhood was marked by deep trauma due to his father's debt, forcing him into factory labor. Later in life, he also suffered from marital strife and family issues.
translatedText: Yarinta ya sami rauni sosai saboda bashin mahaifinsa, wanda ya tilasta masa yin aikin masana'anta. Daga baya kuma ya sha fama da rigingimun aure da matsalolin iyali.
